bankroll.label: ENTERTAINMENT
bankroll.note: money the human is content to lose for entertainment. Not a research stake, not a validated edge, not Kelly.

caps.provenance: chosen by the human as entertainment limits; NOT derived from Kelly, NOT fitted to any result, NOT evidence of edge

Kamaru Usman vs Dricus Du Plessis

Sources: 1 independent origin
Forecast impact: None

Verify before acting.
For entertainment use.

⏸️ PRICE TOO HIGH — DO NOT BUY

Wait for 61¢ or lower. The system will alert again if it becomes available.
